defs: Having the qualities, consistence, or appearance, of butter.

records.ety: [OE. botery, botry; cf. LL. botaria wine vessel; also OE. botelerie, fr. F. bouteillerie, fr. boutellie bottle. Not derived from butter. See Bottle a hollow vessel, Butt a cask.]

defs: An apartment in a house where butter, milk and other provisions are kept.
quotes: All that need a cool and fresh temper, as cellars, pantries, and butteries, to the north.

defs: A room in some English colleges where liquors, fruit, and refreshments are kept for sale to the students.
quotes: And the major Oxford kept the buttery bar.

defs: A cellar in which butts of wine are kept.
